title: Verify classification performance and hard limits
preconditions: Benchmark fixtures exist at, below, and one over 10000 eligible transactions, 500 active rules, 10000 corpus rows, and every published resource limit.
steps: Run published-binary evaluation and validation; measure wall time and peak RSS; exercise exact and one-over limits; inspect rule and Ledger state.
expected: NFR-CLASSIFY-BOUNDED-EVALUATION meets the 5-second and 256-MiB targets and every over-limit request fails before activation or mutation.
